title: Scheduling Complex Projects
scenario: Develop a prompt that generates a project schedule for a complex IT project with multiple milestones, dependencies, and team members. The schedule should include a Gantt chart, task assignments, and critical path identification.
constraints: Must be formatted as a Gantt chart
Must include a clear critical path identification

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the generated schedule accurate and complete, taking into account all dependencies and milestones?
Is the Gantt chart clearly formatted and easy to read?
Is the critical path correctly identified and explained?
